item.title: Panic in addr_from_alloc_id
item.body:

comments.body:
allocation footprint

``` stack (push): 0xffffffff81000000, 0xffffffff80ffffe0, 0xffffffff80ffffdf, 0xffffffff80ffffdf, 0xffffffff80ffffc8, 0xffffffff80ffffb0 [src/alloc_addresses/mod.rs:230:17] thread.thread_display_name(this.machine.threads.active_thread()) = "main" memory_kind=Stack base_addr=0xffffffff80ffffa8 Assigning base address 0xffffffff80ffffa8 to allocation alloc135 [src/alloc_addresses/mod.rs:230:17] thread.thread_display_name(this.machine.threads.active_thread()) = "main" memory_kind=Stack base_addr=0xffffffff80ffffa0 Assigning base address 0xffffffff80ffffa0 to allocation alloc136 stack (pop): 0xffffffff81000000, 0xffffffff80ffffe0, 0xffffffff80ffffdf, 0xffffffff80ffffdf, 0xffffffff80ffffc8 stack (push): 0xffffffff81000000, 0xffffffff80ffffe0, 0xffffffff80ffffdf, 0xffffffff80ffffdf, 0xffffffff80ffffc8, 0xffffffff80ffffb0 [src/alloc_addresses/mod.rs:230:17] thread.thread_display_name(this.machine.threads.active_thread()) = "main" memory_kind=Stack base_addr=0xffffffff80ffffa8 Assigning base address 0xffffffff80ffffa8 to allocation alloc137 [src/alloc_addresses/mod.rs:230:17] thread.thread_display_name(this.machine.threads.active_thread()) = "main" memory_kind=Stack base_addr=0xffffffff80ffffa0 Assigning base address 0xffffffff80ffffa0 to allocation alloc138 thread 'rustc' (25454) panicked at src/alloc_addresses/mod.rs:552:33: assertion `left == right` failed: 16777120 has two AllocId alloc138 and alloc136 left: alloc136 right: alloc138 ```

() from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6 #22 0x00007169d0317c6c in ?? () from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6 ```

StorageDead(_13) will also cause panic, because `free_alloc_id` [double checks](https://github.com/KMiri-rs/miri/blob/5961d97e3afeb3362917ad74ab35cf757c434c5b/src/alloc_addresses/mod.rs#L820) the removed allocation from int_to_ptr_map ``` thread 'rustc' (588284) panicked at src/alloc_addresses/mod.rs:821:9: assertion `left == right` failed left: (16777128, alloc98) right: (16777128, alloc106) ```
``` thread 'rustc' panicked at src/alloc_addresses/mod.rs:839:9: assertion `left == right` failed left: (16776632, alloc146) right: (16776632, alloc147) ```
